title: Convert Text List to JSON Array
cap_description: Convert a list of textable values to a JSON array
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a plain text list into a JSON array of strings. Use this when a downstream cap expects a JSON array but the upstream produces a list of text values.

## Inputs

A list of textable string values.

## Outputs

A JSON array of strings.

## Notes

- Items are placed in the JSON array as quoted strings.
- For the reverse, use [Convert JSON Array to Text List](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;list;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;textable").

args.arg_description: List of textable values to convert
